meta.title: Instability in the faecal flora of a patient suffering from food-related irritable bowel syndrome -- Bradley et al. 23 (1): 29 -- Journal of Medical Microbiology

abstractHtml: The faecal microbial flora of a patient with severe irritable bowel syndrome related to multiple food intolerances was very variable and contained a high proportion of facultative bacteria and an unusual incidence of Clostridium species.
